entries.en::Bánh Mì Thịt Nướng. Bánh Mì Thịt Nướ: Grilled Meatloaf. Grilled Meat Bread with rich flavor, fragrant grilled meat combined with fresh vegetables and signature sauce. Fast service, suitable for convenient meals. The space is simple, clean and friendly. The restaurant has typical dishes such as Grilled Meatloaf, Omelet Bread, and Kho Kho.
entries.en::Bánh Mì Thịt Nướng với hương vị đậm: Grilled Meat Bread with rich flavor, fragrant grilled meat combined with fresh vegetables and signature sauce. Fast service, suitable for convenient meals. The space is simple, clean and friendly.
entries.en::🚶 Bạn hãy tới gần quán \"Bánh Mì Thị: 🚶 Please come near the "Grilled Meatloaf" restaurant to listen to the explanation
entries.de::Bánh Mì Thịt Nướng. Bánh Mì Thịt Nướ: Gegrillter Hackbraten. Gegrilltes Fleischbrot mit reichhaltigem Geschmack, duftendem Grillfleisch kombiniert mit frischem Gemüse und charakteristischer Sauce. Schneller Service, geeignet für praktische Mahlzeiten. Der Raum ist einfach, sauber und freundlich. Das Restaurant bietet typische Gerichte wie gegrillten Hackbraten, Omelettbrot und Kho Kho.
entries.de::🚶 Bạn hãy tới gần quán \"Bánh Mì Thị: 🚶 Bitte kommen Sie in die Nähe des Restaurants „Grilled Meatloaf“, um sich die Erklärung anzuhören
entries.zh-CN::Bánh Mì Thịt Nướng. Bánh Mì Thịt: 烤肉饼。烤肉面包味道浓郁，香喷喷的烤肉搭配新鲜蔬菜和招牌酱汁。服务快捷，适合方便用餐。空间简单、干净、友好。餐厅提供烤肉饼、煎蛋卷面包和Kho Kho等典型菜肴。
entries.zh-CN::🚶 Bạn hãy tới gần quán \"Bánh Mì: 🚶 请到“烤肉饼”餐厅附近听讲解
entries.zh-CN::Quán này hiện chưa có menu để hiể: 该餐厅目前没有可显示的菜单。
entries.zh-CN::Không tìm thấy tour phù hợp: 没有找到合适的旅游团
entries.zh-CN::Tiếp tục chọn nhận món và thanh t: 继续选择接收您的订单并付款
entries.zh-CN::Không thể tải thông tin. Vui lòng: 无法下载信息。请再试一次。
entries.zh-CN::Không tìm thấy quán để đặt món: 找不到可以点餐的餐厅
entries.zh-CN::Vui lòng chọn ít nhất 1 món trước: 请至少选择 1 项，然后再继续
entries.zh-CN::Đặt món thành công! Chủ quán sẽ x: 下单成功！店主会尽快处理申请。
entries.zh-CN::Không thể tải lịch sử đơn hàng lú: 目前无法下载订单历史记录。您仍然可以继续订购。
entries.zh-CN::Vui lòng hoàn thành bước chuyển k: 请在创建应用程序之前完成演示转移步骤
entries.zh-CN::Chọn loại tài khoản để đăng nhập: 选择账户类型进行登录
entries.zh-CN::Đăng nhập bằng email + OTP để khá: 使用电子邮件 + OTP 登录，探索并安排用餐之旅。
entries.zh-CN::Đăng nhập bằng tài khoản do admin: 使用管理员提供的账号登录即可管理店铺。
entries.zh-CN::OTP đã được gửi tới __PH_0__. Vui: OTP 已发送至 __PH_0__。请输入验证码进行登录。
entries.zh-CN::Nhập 6 số OTP: 输入 6 个 OTP 号码
entries.en::Mì Quảng Hội An . Mì quảng hội an ch: Hoi An Quang Noodles. Quang Hoi An noodles are delicious. The restaurant has typical dishes such as Mi Quang Tom Trung, Mi Quang Suon Tom, Mi Quang Suon Trung.
entries.en::🚶 Bạn hãy tới gần quán \"Mì Quảng Hộ: 🚶 Please come near the restaurant "Mi Quang Hoi An" to listen to the explanation
entries.en::Bún riêu cua đồng chuẩn vị: Crab noodle soup with authentic taste
entries.de::Bánh Mì Thịt Nướng với hương vị đậm: Gegrilltes Fleischbrot mit reichhaltigem Geschmack, duftendem Grillfleisch kombiniert mit frischem Gemüse und charakteristischer Sauce. Schneller Service, geeignet für praktische Mahlzeiten. Der Raum ist einfach, sauber und freundlich.
entries.de::Mì Quảng Hội An . Mì quảng hội an ch: Hoi An Quang-Nudeln. Quang Hoi An-Nudeln sind köstlich. Das Restaurant bietet typische Gerichte wie Mi Quang Tom Trung, Mi Quang Suon Tom und Mi Quang Suon Trung.
entries.de::🚶 Bạn hãy tới gần quán \"Mì Quảng Hộ: 🚶 Bitte kommen Sie in die Nähe des Restaurants „Mi Quang Hoi An“, um sich die Erklärung anzuhören
entries.de::🚶 Bạn hãy tới gần quán \"Cơm Tấm Tuấ: 🚶 Bitte kommen Sie in die Nähe des Restaurants „Tuan Ngoc Broken Rice“, um sich die Erklärung anzuhören
entries.de::Quán chè gần gũi: Der Teeladen ist in der Nähe
entries.en::Trà sữa nhà làm topping đa dạng: Homemade milk tea with diverse toppings
entries.fr::🚶 Bạn hãy tới gần quán \"Mì Quảng Hộ: 🚶 Merci de vous approcher du restaurant "Mi Quang Hoi An" pour écouter l'explication
entries.fr::Bún riêu cua đồng chuẩn vị: Soupe de nouilles au crabe au goût authentique
entries.fr::Quán chè gần gũi: Le salon de thé est fermé
entries.fr::Trà sữa nhà làm topping đa dạng: Thé au lait fait maison avec diverses garnitures
entries.fr::Cơm Tấm Tuấn Ngọc. Cơm tấm sườn đậm: Riz brisé Tuan Ngoc. Riz cassé aux côtes savoureux, mangé avec une sauce de poisson mélangée. Le restaurant propose des plats typiques tels que du riz aux côtes levées, du riz aux côtes grillées et du riz aux côtes grillées.
entries.fr::🚶 Bạn hãy tới gần quán \"Cơm Tấm Tuấ: 🚶 Merci de vous approcher du restaurant "Tuan Ngoc Broken Rice" pour écouter l'explication
entries.en::Ở trong khu rừng một con cáo nhỏ cô:
In the forest a lonely little fox lived
Where do the four corners of heaven and earth go when they feel discouraged?
Because I've been waiting for so long and can't find it
Who brought that love to this place?
And then on the other side of the hill one day a flower appeared
The gentle swaying wind soothes our hearts
Then each day passed as dawn rose
At the foot of the hill in the distance the fox was looking at the flower
Do you know that I travel long distances?
Crossing several mountains and rivers, thousands of ice deep rivers
From the moment I first saw you
The days are short and the nights pass quickly
Under the morning sun, I don't belong to anyone
I don't want to be alone or go back to being mine
Words of love are sometimes clumsy
My love, I hope you don't criticize me
And then on the other side of the hill one day a flower appeared
The gentle swaying wind soothes our hearts
Then each day passed as dawn rose
At the foot of the hill in the distance the fox was looking at the flower
Do you know that I travel long distances?
Crossing several mountains and rivers, thousands of ice deep rivers
From the moment I first saw you
The days are short and the nights pass quickly
Under the morning sun, I don't belong to anyone
I don't want to be alone or go back to being mine
Words of love are sometimes clumsy
My love, I hope you don't criticize me
Even though I know that in the future I won't be here forever
Because all over the world, humanity unites and then dissolves
Better than a late sign of love
Our love will remain unfinished for hundreds of years
Is that right, isn't it?
Better than a late sign of love
Our love will remain unfinished for hundreds of years
entries.zh-CN::Không thể lấy vị trí GPS. Vui lòn: 无法获取 GPS 位置。请打开 GPS 并允许访问。
entries.zh-CN::Bánh Mì Thịt Nướng với hương vị đ: 烤肉面包味道浓郁，香喷喷的烤肉搭配新鲜蔬菜和招牌酱汁。服务快捷，适合方便用餐。空间简单、干净、友好。
